## What this adds

- Project: `[Name](https://link)`
- Section: 
- Entry as it would appear in the README:
  ```
  - [Name](https://link) — one-sentence description. `[ai-mode]` `[jurisdiction]`
  ```

## Inclusion gates

Confirm each. PRs that skip this section will be closed without review.

- [ ] **AI mode is clearly one of** `uses-ai`, `ai-defense`, or `agent`. Linked below: the docs/code/feature that proves it.
- [ ] **Open source or source-available with a recognized OSS license.** License: ____
- [ ] **Actively maintained** — most recent meaningful commit within the past 6 months. Date: ____
- [ ] **Real users / track record.** Evidence: ____
- [ ] **Serves a developer or a journalist/researcher reader.** Briefly: ____
- [ ] **Fits the public-interest framing** in CONTEXT.md. Not surveillance, policing, or institutional control of citizens marketed as public-interest.
- [ ] **Entry is alphabetized within its section.**
- [ ] **Description is one sentence.** Marketing copy has been removed.
